case.title: MOREHEAD v. CENTRAL TRUST CO. OF CINCINNATI

opinion.h: MOREHEAD v. CENTRAL TRUST CO. OF CINCINNATI, 304 U.S. 584 (1938)
Charlotte MOREHEAD et al., petitioners, v. The CENTRAL TRUST COMPANY OF CINCINNATI, as executor, etc.* No. 1022.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. George S. Hawke, of Cincinnati, Ohio, for petitioners.
Mr. William J. Rielly, of Cincinnati, Ohio, for respondent.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Supreme Court of the State of Ohio denied.
* Rehearing denied 59 S. Ct. 59, 83 L.Ed. --.[ Morehead v. Central Trust Co of Cincinnati 304 U.S. 584 (1938) ]
